title: Autototem
description: A simple autototem mod. If your totem pops in your offhand, it automatically gets replaced.
body:
# Autototem
A simple autototem mod. If your totem pops in your offhand, it automatically gets replaced.

## Version Support
The current release isn't bound to any Minecraft version, so you can test it in different versions. Feel free to open an issue when your game crashes on another version.

Here is a list of the officially supported versions:
- `1.16.2-1.16.5`
- `1.18.X`
- `1.19.X`
- `1.20.X`
- `1.21.X`
- `26.1.X`
- `26.2.X`

**Note:**
- The totem restocking only works when your totem pops in your offhand
- The totem will be replaced in ~3 ticks
- (Version `<1.1.0`: The server receives a packet that you use the Autototem mod (Server-side opt-out))

**Warning**: On some servers, the use of this mod is a **bannable offense**. Keep it in mind!
